sentence_reviews.text: Robotics and embodied-AI systems connect perception, state estimation, planning, control, learning, safety, and physical actuation in a feedback loop.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Reviewed as synthesis across cited source pointers and, where applicable, the canonical atlas graph context.
sentence_reviews.notes: Former ambiguity resolved by narrowing the audit interpretation to synthesis support rather than requiring exact-source wording.

sentence_reviews.text: End-to-end quality is bounded by the weakest data, model, tool, interface, policy, infrastructure, and human-oversight component. Its direct dependencies include World-model rollout & imagination, Model-predictive control.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.

sentence_reviews.text: Robotics & embodied AI integrates Model-predictive control as part of an end-to-end application boundary.

(2021); ref_ddia: Designing Data-Intensive Applications (2017); ref_digital_twin_ai: AI Simulation by Digital Twins: Systematic Survey, Reference Framework, and Mapping to a Standardized Architecture (2025); ref_dlbook: Deep Learning (2016); ref_domainrand: Domain Randomization for Transferring Deep Neural Networks from Simulation to the Real World (2017); ref_formalml: Formal Methods for Machine Learning: A Survey (2021); ref_jepa: Self-Supervised Learning from Images with a Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture (2023); ref_nist: AI Risk Management Framework 1.0 (2023); ref_pml: Probabilistic Machine Learning: An Introduction (2022); ref_react: ReAct: Synergizing Reasoning and Acting in Language Models (2022); ref_rt2: RT-2: Vision-Language-Action Models Transfer Web Knowledge to Robotic Control (2023); ref_scenario_generation: Foundation Models in Autonomous Driving: A Survey on Scenario Generation and Scenario Analysis (2025); ref_sim2real: Sim-to-Real Transfer in Deep Reinforcement Learning for Robotics: a Survey (2020).
